description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style chaise with a circular, plush purple seat and a matching oval backrest. The frame is constructed from dark, glossy metal with intricate scrollwork, especially prominent on the backrest, which features a decorative ring at the top. The legs are slender, curved, and connected by circular metal supports, giving the piece both stability and elegance. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a solid, velvety fabric, providing a soft and comfortable sitting surface. The overall design is both decorative and functional, suitable for urban parks, boutique cafes, or stylish sidewalk settings. The absence of armrests and the compact form make it ideal for single-person seating in public or semi-public spaces.
description: An ornate, vintage-style chaise with a plush purple seat and oval backrest, set in a decorative dark metal frame with scrollwork. The design is elegant and compact, ideal for stylish urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the oval backrest with scrollwork, circular seat, and decorative metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the curved metal legs and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the oval backrest, scrollwork, and the circular support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest with metal leg details.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is oval-shaped, upholstered in plush purple fabric, and framed by ornate, glossy metal scrollwork with a decorative ring at the top. It is vertically oriented and visually prominent, adding elegance and height to the piece.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, curved, and made of glossy dark metal, connected by circular metal supports for added stability and decorative appeal.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid purple, velvety fabric with a smooth, plush texture and no visible pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, circular seat cushion and an attached oval backrest cushion, both integrated into the frame with no loose or layered cushions.
